name: 24 Carat
overview: Haya lives with her husband Youssef, a wealthy businessman in Lebanon. But their life changes drastically when a gang attempts to assassinate Youssef, leaving him with severe injuries. Mira arrives by chance and takes Youssef to her house to aid him and discovers that he has lost his memory.

trailers.title: #CBCegy | #CBCPromo | تابعوا.. مسلسل 24 قيراط من السبت إلى الأربعاء في الـ 7 مساءً
